c_permutation.note: signal tuples permuted across the 23 dev events; legs/funding recomputed per side

e_causality.signal_completes_at_entry_instant: yes — sign(reaction) uses the 16:00 close print, entry is the same print

implementable_sign_test.proxy: perp 15:55 ET bar close vs pre-earnings-date perp RTH close

post_dt_neq_anchor_detail.detail: CSCO afterhours 2026-05-13: stock day-0 = 05-14 but perp listed mid-day 05-15, so anchor=05-15 (entry one day later than design). Signal fully known before entry -> no lookahead; one-event design deviation only.

frozen_rule_text_mismatch.issue: frozen rule says "perp listed at REPORT time", but implementation only requires a panel row within 4 calendar days; AMDUSDT (anchor 05-06) and CSCOUSDT (05-15) perps listed mid-RTH ON the anchor day, ADBEUSDT (06-12) 0.6d after listing — perp did NOT exist at report time for these. Entry itself was executable (perp live at 16:00 ET), so no lookahead, but first-day books are near-dead (see d_cost_realism) and the rule text must be aligned before July forward.

verdict_summary.replication: exact (+2.1301 / t 2.255 / n 23 / win 60.9; 79 matched, 53 unlisted-drops all legitimate)
verdict_summary.a: not beta in disguise: beta_hat=1.23 strip -> +2.24 (t 2.36); beta=2 -> +2.60; self-excluded/median baskets ~unchanged; shorts fought a RISING market (side*mkt = -0.47, strip penalized not flattered)
verdict_summary.b: no dup symbols; LOSO min +1.60 (t 1.96, SNDK out); LODO(date) min +1.77 reproduces; top-2 events 27% of |pnl|
verdict_summary.c: B=5000 sign-permutation: candidate cell perm p=0.0054; max-t over gate-eligible (n>=20) family p=0.032; full 64-cell min-p family p=0.055; horizon-monotone-positive pattern appears in 20% of nulls (weak supporting evidence, as suspected)
verdict_summary.d: cost is the weak axis for SIZE not for sign: median entry 1m range 0.19%, 8/23 entries have <$100k qv in ±5min (HD $1.4k, TSM $10k, WMT $13k, CSCO $14k); breakeven RT cost 2.25%; at 0.5% RT cost mean +1.75 (t~1.85). Fine at user $50-100 clips; not scalable.
verdict_summary.e: no report_time=unknown; no lookahead; sign uses the entry print itself -> implementable 15:55-proxy version: 1/21 knife-edge flip (MSTR rxn -0.04%), recompute +1.90%/t 1.84 (direction intact); rule-text vs implementation mismatch on listing-day perps must be fixed pre-forward
